changeSet.author: agent-5
changeSet.comment: Create table for tracking individual document ratings and feedback
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE document_ratings ADD CONSTRAINT check_rating_range CHECK (rating >= 1 AND rating <= 5);

changeSet.author: agent-5
changeSet.comment: Create trigger to update avg_rating in document_metadata when ratings change

rollback.sql: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_update_avg_rating ON document_ratings; DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS update_document_avg_rating();
